mapper.select:
SELECT a.video_id, a.video_nm, a.media_rating_type, a.play_tm, c.video_img_url, f.artist_id, f.artist_nm
FROM tb_video a INNER JOIN tb_new_video b ON a.video_id = b.video_id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_video_img c ON a.video_id = c.video_id AND c.video_img_type = 'VIDEO_IMG_TYPE.1 '
INNER JOIN tb_video_artist e ON a.video_id = e.video_id AND rp_yn ='Y' INNER JOIN ted_artist f ON e.artist_id = f.artist_id INNER JOIN tb_character_prefer_artist g ON e.artist_id = g.artist_id AND g.character_no = #{characterNo}
WHERE a.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND a.video_type in ('TEASER', 'MV', 'LIVE')
AND DATE_FORMAT(a.disp_start_dtime , '%y%m%d')= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%y%m%d')
AND NOW() BETWEEN a.disp_start_dtime AND DATE_ADD(a.disp_start_dtime, INTERVAL 3 DAY)
GROUP BY a.video_id

SELECT f.video_id, f.video_nm, f.media_rating_type, f.play_tm, h.video_img_url, j.artist_id, j.artist_nm
FROM tb_character a
INNER JOIN tb_character_prefer_genre b on a.character_no = b.character_no INNER JOIN tb_prefer_genre c on b.prefer_genre_id = c.prefer_genre_id INNER JOIN tb_map_prefer_genre_svc_genre d on d.prefer_genre_id = c.prefer_genre_id INNER JOIN tb_map_svc_genre_video e on d.svc_genre_id = e.svc_genre_id INNER JOIN tb_video f on f.video_id = e.video_id INNER JOIN tb_new_video g ON f.video_id = g.video_id
LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_video_img h ON f.video_id = h.video_id AND h.video_img_type = 'VIDEO_IMG_TYPE.1 '
LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_video_artist i ON f.video_id = i.video_id AND i.rp_yn ='Y'
INNER JOIN ted_artist j ON i.artist_id = j.artist_id
WHERE b.character_no = #{characterNo} AND f.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND f.video_type in ('TEASER', 'MV', 'LIVE') AND NOW() BETWEEN f.disp_start_dtime AND DATE_ADD(f.disp_start_dtime, INTERVAL 7 DAY)
GROUP BY f.video_id
